# Microsoft Graph Changelog - Comprehensive Feature Extraction

## Permission Changes (February 23, 2026)
- **FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All**: No longer requires admin consent
- **FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All**: No longer requires admin consent
- **ThreatSubmission.Read**: Now requires admin consent
- **ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite**: Now requires admin consent

## Identity & Governance Features

### Lifecycle Workflows Enhancements
- **User Inactivity Trigger** (November 25, 2025): New resource for detecting inactive users
- **Activation with Scope** (November 10, 2025): Added activateWithScope method
- **Administration Scope Targets** (February 19, 2026): Relationship added to workflowBase resource
- **Workflow Capacity Increase** (April 18, 2024): Support expanded from 50 to 100 workflows per tenant
- **activationScope resources**: activateGroupScope, activateRunScope, activateUserScope, activateProcessingResultScope
- **PATCH operation** for task updates in lifecycle workflows
- **triggerAttribute** resource type
- **attributeChangeTrigger** resource for attribute-based execution
- **membershipChangeTrigger** and **membershipChangeType** enumeration
- **groupBasedSubjectSet** for group-based workflow scope definition

### Insights & Analytics
- **Lifecycle Workflows Insights** (May 7, 2024): Aggregate health metrics
- Four summary methods: topTasksProcessedSummary, topWorkflowsProcessedSummary, workflowsProcessedByCategory, workflowsProcessedSummary

### Advanced Trigger Types (April 15, 2024)
- attributeChangeTrigger, membershipChangeTrigger, groupBasedSubjectSet

## Users & Groups - Bicep Template Support
- User resource (January 30, 2025)
- Application resources (May 21, 2024): application, federatedIdentityCredential, servicePrincipal, oAuth2PermissionGrant, appRoleAssignment
- Group resource (May 21, 2024)

## Regional Availability
- Microsoft Graph Activity Logs in China operated by 21Vianet (December 16, 2024)

## Change Notifications
- Event Hubs SAS authentication deprecation, Microsoft Entra ID RBAC recommended (September 19, 2024)

## Reports & Sign-In Analytics
- **agent** property with agentSignIn resource and agentType enumeration (May 13, 2025)
- **samlSignInFailure** alert (July 31, 2025)
- **conditionalAccessBlockedSignIn** alert (April 1, 2025)
- New protocolType members: kerberos, seamlessSso, prtGrant, onBehalfOf, samlOnBehalfOf (and 12 more added March 23, 2025)
- Self-Service Sign-Up Analytics (June 20, 2025): selfServiceSignUp, signUpIdentity, signUpStatus, signUpIdentifierType, signUpStage enumerations
- Audit Log linkableIdentifiers and tokenDetails (March 26, 2025)
- emailOtpSend, attributeCollectionStart, attributeCollectionSubmit (January 10, 2025)
- sessionId (November 13, 2024), appOwnerTenantId/resourceOwnerTenantId (January 28, 2025)
- relyingPartyDetailedSummary resource and getRelyingPartyDetailedSummary method (April 1, 2024)

## Agents
- Agent Sign-In Tracking (November 17, 2025): Extended agentType enumeration with agentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal and agentIDuser
- agentSubjectParentId and agentSubjectType properties on agentSignIn

## Network & Security
- New filteringPolicyAction and remoteNetworkStatus enumerations

## Deletions
- conditionalAccessAudience removed (December 11, 2025 - Beta)

## Schema Extensions
- Generally available in Microsoft Cloud for US Government

## eDiscovery
- ediscoveryCase, reviewSet, reviewSetQuery resources (beta)

Updated: 2026-04-10
